query:
SELECT INDEX_NAME, NON_UNIQUE, COLUMN_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME = 'productivity_score_details'
ORDER BY INDEX_NAME, SEQ_IN_INDEX;

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, psd.businessDate, psd.stationCode, COUNT(*) AS duplicate_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS duplicate_event_count
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND psd.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  AND psd.stationEventId IN (
    SELECT stationEventId
    FROM productivity_score_details
    GROUP BY stationEventId
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  )
GROUP BY u.name, psd.businessDate, psd.stationCode
ORDER BY u.name, psd.businessDate, psd.stationCode;
